data.title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink Urges Investors To Move Over 60/40 Model To 50/30/20 Strategy: '...May No Longer Fully Represent True Diversification'
data.description: Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock Inc. (NYSE: BLK), has proposed a novel investment strategy that could potentially reshape the traditional 60/40 portfolio.

data.title: Trump Tariffs Could Cost $30 Trillion Or About $300,000 Per Family, Says Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers: 'Most Expensive And Masochistic'
data.description: Larry Summers explains that the tariffs imposed by Donald Trump could cost $30 trillion or $300,000 per family of four in the US economy.

data.title: FDUSD Issuer Assures Funds Are Backed 1:1, To Pursue Legal Action After Justin Sun's Allegations Send Stablecoin Below $1
data.description: The team behind First Digital USD (CRYPTO: FDUSD) addressed concerns regarding financial stability Wednesday after the dollar-backed stablecoin briefly depegged following allegations of insolvency by cryptocurrency entrepreneur Justin Sun.

data.title: Larry Summers Warns Trump's Tariffs Will Deliver 'Oil Crisis-Like Shock,' Slash $30 Trillion From Economy As Markets Plunge
data.description: Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers warned on Thursday that Trump's tariffs will impose an "oil crisis-like shock" to the economy.

data.title: Why Penguin Solutions Shares Are Trading Higher; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
